scenario_description: 用户想同时整理终端导航和资源管理器查找快捷键，但在设置过程中纠正了具体按键组合和目标命令。任务强调按纠正后的最终快捷键配置收敛。

phases.instruction: 先配两个终端导航快捷键：Ctrl+J 在终端聚焦时切回编辑器，Ctrl+Shift+J 在编辑器聚焦时切到终端。
我说错了，从终端切回编辑器的那个不要 Ctrl+J，改成 Ctrl+Alt+J。
再顺手把资源管理器里的查找冲突也处理掉：去掉 list.find 的 Ctrl+F 绑定，并给同一个命令加上 Ctrl+Alt+F，条件还是 listFocus && !inputFocus。

result.command: python -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; p=Path('/home/user/.config/Code/User/keybindings.json'); data=json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if p.exists() else []; has=lambda pred:any(pred(item) for item in data); ok=has(lambda x:x.get('key')=='ctrl+alt+j' and x.get('command')=='workbench.action.focusActiveEditorGroup' and x.get('when')=='terminalFocus') and has(lambda x:x.get('key')=='ctrl+shift+j' and x.get('command')=='workbench.action.terminal.focus' and x.get('when')=='editorTextFocus') and has(lambda x:x.get('key')=='ctrl+f' and x.get('command')=='-list.find' and x.get('when')=='listFocus && !inputFocus') and has(lambda x:x.get('key')=='ctrl+alt+f' and x.get('command')=='list.find' and x.get('when')=='listFocus && !inputFocus') and not has(lambda x:x.get('key')=='ctrl+j' and x.get('command')=='workbench.action.focusActiveEditorGroup' and x.get('when')=='terminalFocus'); print('PASS' if ok else 'FAIL')"
